data.title: New in Hong Kong: Peaq reveals tokenized robo-farm, automating indoor farming, rewarding token holders through NFTs.
data.description: A recently unveiled initiative is set to revolutionize stacked indoor farming by implementing automation. This groundbreaking project will distribute profits with token holders utilizing Non-Fungible Tokens (NFTs) on the peaq network.

data.title: Q-Gold announces fully subscribed private placement financing for undisclosed amount.
data.description: The number of new employment opportunities in the tech sector surged by 15% last quarter, with over 50,000 job openings posted. The average salary in this industry also saw an increase of 10%, now standing at around $95,000 per year. The highest demand was for software developers and data analysts, accounting for over 60% of the total job listings. This growth is attributed to the digital transformation trend affecting various industries and the increasing reliance on technology solutions. Job seekers with skills in cloud computing, artificial intelligence, and cybersecurity are in particularly high demand. Tech companies are actively recruiting talent to keep up with the rapid pace of innovation and maintain their competitive edge in the market.

data.title: Hyundai honors legacy of STELLAR and SONATA, 40th SONATA anniversary marked with an exhibition in Seoul.
data.description: Hyundai Motor commemorated the 40th anniversary of SONATA with a special exhibition and magazine. The event showcased the legacy of STELLAR and SONATA Restored 1988, featuring archival materials at piknic in Seoul. The exhibition traced the evolution of Hyundai Motor's mid-size sedans. Additionally, the second edition of the commemorative magazine celebrated the milestone, capturing the history and achievements of SONATA over the years.

data.title: Zum wins 2025 Electric Innovation Award for student transportation, noted for boosting safety and efficiency.
data.description: Redwood City, California - Zūm, a prominent player in modern student transportation, was honored during Climate Week NYC on Sept. 24, 2025. The company revealed that it has recently won the 2025 Electric Innovation Award for its cutting-edge technology aiming to enhance safety, efficiency, and grid resiliency. This recognition highlights Zūm's commitment to innovation and sustainability in its operations.

data.title: Australia is working on a draft law to regulate digital asset platforms, extending financial laws to crypto for better oversight.
data.description: Australia is looking to extend its financial services laws to include cryptocurrencies with a new draft bill. The legislation aims to enhance safeguards and establish clearer regulations in the rapidly growing crypto market. This move comes as the country seeks to address the increasing popularity and use of digital assets. By bringing cryptocurrencies under the existing financial services laws, Australia intends to better regulate this sector and provide more robust protection to investors. This development is crucial as the crypto market continues to expand, with the current market capitalization exceeding $2 trillion.

data.title: Micron CEO credits AI for record-breaking 2025, beats analyst estimates in Q4. Stock is surging.
data.description: Micron Technology, Inc. revealed analyst projections for its fourth-quarter performance with CEO Sanjay Mehrotra crediting AI-related demand for the growth. Mehrotra anticipates FY 2025 to be a groundbreaking period, emphasizing Micron's dominance in high-bandwidth memory and DRAM, and a solid position heading into FY 2026. The company exceeded expectations in both top and bottom-line figures. The trading status of MU stock is on the move due to these developments. For more in-depth coverage, refer to Benzinga.com.

data.title: Terminus Modern Ballet Theatre launches 9th season with "Out of the Box: Series III," featuring new dancers, runs Sept 20-28.
data.description: Terminus Modern Ballet Theatre (TMBT) is launching its ninth season at Tula Arts Center's "White Box Theatre" in Atlanta from Sept. 20 to 28, 2025. The intimate mixed bill features bold new choreography, emphasizing the company's commitment to making dance inclusive. TMBT aims to reach a wide audience, with the performance highlighting their mission.

data.title: Cadiz, Inc. (NASDAQ: CDZI / CDZIP) declares 8.875% dividend on Series A preferred stock, Q3 2025. #Cadiz #dividend #CDZI
data.description: On September 24, 2025, the California-based water solutions company Cadiz, Inc. (NASDAQ: CDZI / CDZIP) declared a cash dividend for its 8.875% Series A Cumulative Perpetual. The announcement was made by the company's Board of Directors.

data.title: GSR proposes a new treasury-focused fund among four others in a recent filing, presenting it before the SEC.
data.description: GSR, a market maker, introduced a proposal for a treasury-focused fund among four additional proposals in a filing made on Wednesday.
